themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "In what ways do you try to 'set dominion' in areas where only God has authority?". Word-study detail reinforces "מִשְׁטָר֣וֹ: the dominion - jurisdiction".
